---
applyTo: "src/app/**/*.tsx,src/components/**/*.tsx,src/lib/**/*.ts"
description: "Use when creating pages, content blocks, metadata, internal links, and structured data."
---

- Match the page structure and SEO patterns defined in `docs/05-seo-aeo.md` and `docs/06-routing-pages.md`.
- Every public page should include title, description, canonical, openGraph, twitter, and alternates when applicable.
- Use breadcrumb, FAQ, Article, Organization, Person, and WebSite schema where appropriate.
- Keep internal linking visible in article and area pages.
- Preserve the premium minimal layout and warm palette.
- Use the existing content and migrations as the source of truth for copied site content.
